response.original_title: A Journey of Craft: Spinning into the Future with Mikako Ichikawa in Morioka
response.overview: A very niche documentary, or a specific travelogue in Morioka, Iwate prefecture, Japan. With a famous Japanese actress Mikako Ichikawa, they explore traditional crafts in Morioka, focusing on the future of these arts.
response.title: A Journey of Craft: Spinning into the Future with Mikako Ichikawa in Morioka
